title: Reading List: Articles to Explore
drDigitalIntro: Reading List is different from bookmarks — it's for articles you want to read later. See an article that looks interesting but don't have time now? Add it to Reading List with Shift+Command+D. Later, click the Reading List sidebar icon and browse what you've saved. Articles in Reading List can be read offline — Safari caches them. It's perfect for saving recipes, news articles, or blog posts.

playgroundTask.question: What is Safari's Reading List best for?

options.text: Websites you visit every single day
Articles you want to read later

drDigitalSuccess: Reading List is your 'save for later' pile — great for articles you spotted but haven't had time to read.
drDigitalHint: The name says it all: Reading List is a list of things to read — later.
